title: The Mosaic Company (MOS) CEO Joc O'Rourke on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: The Mosaic Company (NYSE:MOS ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 2, 2022 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Paul Massoud - Vice President, Investor Relations & Financial Planning & Analysis Joc O'Rourke - President & Chief Executive Officer Clint Freeland - Senior Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Steve Byrne - Bank of America Joel Jackson - BMO Vincent Andrews - Morgan Stanley Lucas Beaumont - UBS John Roberts - Credit Suisse Adam Samuelson - Goldman Sachs Michael Piken - Cleveland Research Andrew Wong - RBC Jeff Zekauskas - JPMorgan Chris Parkinson - Mizuho Operator Good morning, ladies and gentlemen, and welcome to The Mosaic Company Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. title: Mosaic posts higher second-quarter profits
